_comment: State/local procurement monitors. Adapter types: 'socrata' (clean JSON API, preferred), 'html' (scrape a server-rendered listing), 'placeholder' (documented, not automated). Add coverage by appending entries.

sources.name: Florida (AHCA Medicaid / MyFloridaMarketPlace)
sources.note: No clean FREE automated path. MFMP is a JS SPA whose API endpoint is built at runtime (not greppable); AHCA & DOH purchasing pages return 403/404 to scripts; the legacy VBS PL/SQL app is dead. Coverage options: (1) FREE — register for MFMP/VBS 'Electronic Notification' + AHCA 'Procurements' email alerts (manual triage); (2) PAID — HigherGov or GovTribe API covers FL + all states cleanly (~$1.8k/yr GovTribe); (3) BUILD — a headless-browser (Playwright) scraper of MFMP, brittle and higher-maintenance, on request.
